name: real_pig_e2e_log_summary
cmd:
python3 - <<'PY2'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/tmp/pcc-proof-pig-log-xterm/pig-command-compiler.jsonl')
print('log path', p)
print('exists', p.exists())
for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
    o=json.loads(line)
    print(o.get('ts'), o.get('event'), o.get('input'), (o.get('data') or {}).get('mode') or (o.get('data') or {}).get('reason') or (o.get('data') or {}).get('action'))
PY2
stdout:
log path /tmp/pcc-proof-pig-log-xterm/pig-command-compiler.jsonl
exists True
2026-05-20T22:05:22.037Z compiler_debug_info None None
2026-05-20T22:05:24.384Z compiler_route weather today direct_exec
2026-05-20T22:05:28.581Z input_decision weather today direct_exec
2026-05-20T22:05:29.714Z direct_exec_result weather today weather.brief
